allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Auto Aagentic Development LifeCycle Platform *)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/projects" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($response.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $projects = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Found $\($projects.Count\) projects" -ForegroundColor Green; if \($projects.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host "First project:" -ForegroundColor Cyan; $projects[0] | ConvertTo-Json | Write-Host } } else { Write-Host "API not ready yet" })
